shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc 'pwd && git status --short && rg -n "renderCustomHeader|monthsShown|changeMonth|activeMonth" src test tests 2>/dev/null | head -240'
/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,90p' src/test/calendar_test.test.tsx; rg -n \"function getCalendar|const getCalendar\" src/test/calendar_test.test.tsx src/test/datepicker_test.test.tsx"
/bin/bash -lc 'rg -n "monthSelectedIn" README.md docs src | cat; git log -8 --oneline -- src/calendar.tsx src/index.tsx'
/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '820,865p' src/index.tsx; sed -n '260,285p' src/calendar.tsx; git status --short package.json && git diff -- package.json"
/bin/bash -lc 'git remote -v; git branch -a --contains HEAD | head; git blame -L 430,475 src/calendar.tsx; git blame -L 820,855 src/index.tsx'
/bin/bash -lc "rg -n \"calcInitialState|preSelection:\" src/index.tsx | head -30 && sed -n '280,325p' src/index.tsx && sed -n '940,990p' src/index.tsx"
/bin/bash -lc 'git show 23a0c99b7''^:src/index.jsx 2>/dev/null | rg -n "onMonthChange|monthSelectedIn" | head -30; git log --all --oneline --grep='"'monthSelectedIn\\|custom header' -i | head -30"
